items.title: Personal Drama
items.description: Conflict between individuals threatens to escalate into something supernatural

items.title: Betrayal
items.description: An ally turns against the group or hides dangerous secrets

items.title: Power Struggle
items.description: Rival factions compete for control over territory or influence

items.title: Disappearance
items.description: Someone vanishes under strange circumstances

items.title: Strange Sightings
items.description: Reports of unusual creatures or phenomena increase

items.title: Hidden Truth
items.description: A secret lies beneath a seemingly normal situation

items.title: Cleanup
items.description: Remove evidence of supernatural activity before exposure

items.title: Cover-Up
items.description: Manipulate events or information to maintain secrecy

items.title: Containment
items.description: Prevent a threat from spreading or escalating

items.title: Ritual Event
items.description: A ritual is being performed, interrupted, or going wrong

items.title: Manifestation
items.description: An entity appears or becomes active in the area

items.title: Corruption Spread
items.description: A force is slowly tainting people or environment

items.title: Hunt
items.description: Track and eliminate a dangerous entity

items.title: Defense
items.description: Protect a person, place, or object from attack

items.title: Ambush
items.description: Prepare or survive a sudden attack

items.title: Time Loop
items.description: Events repeat with subtle or escalating differences

items.title: Reality Glitch
items.description: Physical laws behave inconsistently

items.title: Liminal Intrusion
items.description: A place becomes disconnected from normal reality

items.title: Artifact Retrieval
items.description: Recover or secure a powerful object

items.title: Escort
items.description: Safely transport a person or item

items.title: Theft
items.description: Steal or reclaim something valuable

items.title: Haunting
items.description: A location or person is plagued by a persistent presence

items.title: Madness
items.description: People begin acting irrationally or dangerously

items.title: Obsession
items.description: An individual becomes fixated on something unnatural

items.title: Outbreak
items.description: A condition or entity spreads rapidly

items.title: Invasion
items.description: Outside forces enter and disrupt the area

items.title: Collapse
items.description: A system, faction, or reality structure begins to fail

items.title: Bystanders
items.description: Civilians are present and at risk

items.title: Authorities Involved
items.description: Police or officials interfere or investigate

items.title: Witness
items.description: Someone saw something they shouldn’t have

items.title: Internal Betrayal
items.description: An ally is secretly working against the group

items.title: False Information
items.description: Key facts are wrong or misleading

items.title: Missing Piece
items.description: Critical information is unavailable

items.title: Hidden Factor

items.title: Time Limit

items.title: Escalation
items.description: The problem worsens over time

items.title: Recurring Event
items.description: The issue repeats in cycles

items.title: Secondary Entity

items.title: Corruption
items.description: People or environment become tainted

items.title: Uncontrolled Power

items.title: Environmental Hazard
items.description: Dangerous surroundings complicate actions

items.title: Isolation

items.title: Unstable Location
items.description: The area itself is shifting or collapsing

items.title: Injury
items.description: A character is physically compromised

items.title: Emotional Trigger

items.title: Obsession
items.description: A character becomes fixated on the situation

items.title: Competition

items.title: Reality Distortion

items.title: Identity Confusion
